title: 宝塚記念の後に・熱を受けて！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen felt like a dream! I felt
everyone's passion, light, and dreams while I ran
alongside them!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I ran this race! I can still feel
everyone's dreams burning so hot! I want to pit
my dream against theirs again someday!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
My next goal race is the Sprinters Stakes! I've got
to stand at the summit of sprints if I want to
become Oguri's ultimate rival!
